scripts.validate: pnpm --filter @commercetools/processors run validate && pnpm --filter @commercetools/commerce-agent run validate && pnpm --filter @commercetools/commerce-mcp run validate
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @commercetools/processors run build && pnpm --filter @commercetools/commerce-agent run build && pnpm --filter @commercetools/commerce-mcp run build
